subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Prints this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: Add an npm registry user account

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Create a new project with a template

subcommands.name: pack
subcommands.description: Create a tarball of the npm package (does not publish)

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.description: Pack and publish a package to npm

options.description: Show help for wasm-pack or for the given subcommand(s)
Log verbosity is based off the number of v used
The maximum level of messages that should be logged by wasm-pack
